commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Codex native-assets doctor warning, its unit test expectation, and the doctor CLI docs to tell users to install the external Codex plugin before running the Codex migration command when needed.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main can emit the Codex migration warning while the migration provider resolver throws when `codex` is not registered. The linked issue also includes a concrete 2026.5.19 user reproduction.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and normal maintainer/CI validation.

target.title: fix(doctor): clarify Codex migration plugin requirement
target.body:
## Summary

- Clarify the Codex native-assets doctor warning so users install the external Codex plugin before running `openclaw migrate codex --dry-run` when the migration provider is unavailable.
- Update the doctor CLI docs to match the warning.
- Cover the revised warning text in the existing Codex native-assets doctor test.

## Tests

- RED: `node --no-maglev ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-native-assets.test.ts --run` (failed before implementation with the old warning text)
- GREEN: `node --no-maglev ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-native-assets.test.ts --run`
- `node node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-native-assets.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-native-assets.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

Behavior addressed: Doctor no longer points users only at a Codex migration command that can be unavailable when the external Codex plugin is not installed.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout with existing node_modules; direct node-based Vitest/Oxlint invocation used because pnpm commands attempted dependency reconciliation and timed out downloading optional native packages.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node --no-maglev ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-native-assets.test.ts --run`
Evidence after fix: the Codex native-assets doctor test file passed, including the revised warning assertion.
Observed result after fix: 1 test file passed; 3 tests passed.
What was not tested: full `pnpm check:changed` and `pnpm docs:list` were not completed because pnpm attempted install/dependency reconciliation and timed out on optional package downloads.

Closes #84948
target.author: leno23
